title: GPU Cloud Deployment Without Leaving Your IDE — Audry Hsu, RunPod
summary: Flash is a deployment framework that replaces multi-step Docker and container workflows with a single decorator. It enables hot reload for model swaps and GPU cloud deployment directly from the IDE, with pay-per-request pricing and autoscaling capabilities across RunPod infrastructure.
writeup: This talk from RunPod's Audry Hsu introduces Flash, a deployment framework that collapses multi-step Docker and container workflows into a single decorator. It targets the friction of moving models to GPU clouds: Flash supports hot reload for model swaps and deployment directly from the IDE, removing the usual container build cycle. The operational model is serverless, with pay-per-request pricing and autoscaling across RunPod infrastructure.
